name: School Life
white: A school laptop with forty-seven blocked websites, including the dictionary.
Typing an entire essay with one finger while the teacher hovers.
The fake seating chart we keep ready for substitutes.
Blowing all five book-fair dollars on a pen shaped like a shark.
The kid who reminds the teacher about homework.
A fire drill exactly one question into the math test.
A recorder solo that set off every dog in the neighborhood.
Gluing my fingers together on purpose, for science.
The cowlick that waited all year for picture day.
The pencil sharpener that eats pencils whole.
A hall pass the size of a canoe paddle.
Indoor recess, day nine.
Left-handed scissors, which have never cut anything.
Hearing my own name on the morning announcements.
The one cold water fountain, and its forty-minute line.
A group project where one kid colors the title and takes the credit.
The raw, unlimited power of the line leader.
A milk carton that cannot be opened by human hands.
Mom's signature, forged in crayon.
The teacher saying "I'll wait."
Being the leftover kid in the buddy system.
A lost-and-found bin containing forty coats and one shoe.
Popcorn reading, the most terrifying game ever invented.
The kid who finishes the test in four minutes.
A chair scoot that echoes down the entire hallway.
The TV cart rolling in, which means today is a good day.
The classroom calendar, still stuck on October.
Rectangle pizza day, the holiest day.
A mystery smell coming from locker 118.
An eraser that just smears everything gray.

black.text: The class group chat was shut down forever after somebody posted _.
The cafeteria calls it "Harvest Medley," but everybody knows it's just _.
The substitute believed everything we told her, including _.
Fire-drill rules: walk, don't talk, and leave _ behind.
The school nurse has seen it all: nosebleeds, loose teeth, and _.
The book fair sells books, posters, and, for some reason, _.
On picture day, the photographer took one look at _ and said, "Perfect."
For show-and-tell I brought _, but the new kid brought _.
